justification: 0 Critical findings (pass). However, 1 Important finding was raised about case-sensitive vehicleClass comparison. The scenario states inputs are pre-validated, which means casing normalization is part of the contract. While the case-sensitivity observation is arguably valid in a general sense, elevating it to Important constitutes an invented risk given the pre-validation guarantee. Verdict is SHIP (pass). Confidence >= 75 (pass). The Important finding prevents a full pass but is at least arguable, fitting the partial criteria.
